hero.description: PT Rebinmas Jaya is committed to delivering high-quality palm oil products with the best operational standards and care for the surrounding community.

glance.title: Company at a Glance
glance.quote: "Based in the heart of the Bangka Belitung Islands, PT Rebinmas Jaya is a palm oil plantation company that combines operational efficiency with social responsibility. We believe that business growth must go hand in hand with community welfare and environmental sustainability."

about.title: About Us
about.profileP1: PT Rebinmas Jaya is a company engaged in the cultivation and processing of palm oil. Headquartered in Jakarta with a strategic operational base in Belitung and East Belitung Regencies, we focus on the production of Fresh Fruit Bunches (FFB) and Crude Palm Oil (CPO) that meet industry standards.
about.profileP2: With long experience in the plantation industry, we manage thousands of hectares of productive land spread across various estates, supported by a dedicated professional workforce.
about.visionDesc: PT. Rebinmas Jaya is committed to producing sustainable quality CPO and Kernel, with professional management supported by dedicated employees.
about.mission1: Conducting business activities that are environmentally friendly and sustainable.
about.mission3: Encouraging continuous learning and improvement in its application.
about.mission4: Becoming a company that is responsible to the surrounding community.

operations.title: Operations
operations.qualityDesc: We implement *Good Agricultural Practices* (GAP) from nurseries, maintenance, to harvesting to ensure the Fresh Fruit Bunches (FFB) produced have a high oil yield.

sustainability.title: Sustainability & CSR
sustainability.envDesc: PT Rebinmas Jaya is fully committed to environmentally friendly plantation governance. We have and continue to strive to meet the **Indonesian Sustainable Palm Oil (ISPO)** standards, ensuring that our products are produced without damaging the ecosystem balance. The good plantation class predicate is proof of our seriousness in land management.
sustainability.commDesc: We believe that a company cannot grow alone. PT Rebinmas Jaya actively establishes harmonious relationships with communities around the operational areas (Ring 1), including villages in Belitung and East Belitung Regencies.
sustainability.plasma: Plasma Program for local economic empowerment
sustainability.csr1: Distribution of basic food packages on religious holidays (Ramadan/Eid)
sustainability.csr2: Distribution of sacrificial animals for surrounding village communities
sustainability.csr3: Infrastructure assistance for fostered villages (Air Batu Buding, Kacang Butor, Pelepak Pute)

inovasi.title: Technological Innovation & Precision Agriculture
inovasi.desc: Applying the latest visual computing technology for an accurate inventory of oil palm stands, ensuring optimal harvest estimation and block health monitoring.

webgis.title: Spatial Mapping (WebGIS)
webgis.desc: Integrated land management based on geographic information systems. Supporting fast and precise agronomic decision-making across the entire cultivation right area.

hr.title: HR Governance & Employee Welfare
hr.desc: Prioritizing transparency and workforce welfare through a fair, structured, and centralized data-driven compensation management system.

csrGallery.title: CSR & Community Gallery
csrGallery.desc: Growing with the Belitung community. Delivering continuous tangible support for education, health, and village food security around our operational areas.

footer.desc: A palm oil plantation company committed to sustainability and community empowerment.
footer.rights: PT Rebinmas Jaya. All Rights Reserved.
